subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who settest aflame the hearts of ardent lovers! I beseech Thee, by the Luminary of the horizons, to send down upon the hearts of Thy loved ones tranquillity from Thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محرق قلوب العشاق اسئلک بنیر الافاق بان تنزل فی قلب احبائک سکینه من عندک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
